Stories Tagged "Forest Figure"

A focused archive path for Forest Figure, collecting 3 related Kyunolab stories across 1 shelf.

Mythic Creatures

The Ash Owl That Knows the Last Door

A careful reading of an ash-colored owl is said to know the last door a traveler should never open.

Mythic Creatures - 8 min read
Mythic Creatures

The Iron Toad Under the Old Mill Wheel

A careful reading of an iron toad under an old mill wheel is said to wake when the river runs backward.

Mythic Creatures - 10 min read
Mythic Creatures

The Glass Deer at the Edge of Winter: A Mythic Creature Made of Silence and Cold Light

At the edge of winter, a bright animal appears in the trees and leaves no tracks except the quiet it creates.

Mythic Creatures - 9 min read
